systemStatus.headline: Monday 4 AM run — Sling Apr 26 yesterday + last clean Toast Apr 25 carried forward.
systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast Sun Apr 26 DPS not yet delivered (expected ~7:40 AM PT). Latest fully parsed Toast = Sat Apr 25: $5,479.75 net / 192 guests / 20.8% labor. Apr 26 weekly summary email did arrive but Gmail MCP returns no parseable body. (2) Sling Sun Apr 26 (yesterday): 8 staff, 36 hrs, 0 OT, 0 uncovered. Sling Mon Apr 27 (today) not yet delivered. (3) Google Ads: 4 reports in last 2 days (2 daily campaign + 2 campaign performance). No disapprovals or budget alerts. Live Apr 25 numbers from prior run still current. (4) Yelp: only marketing newsletter — no actionable inquiries. (5) TripAdvisor: NEW 5-bubble review from UK visitors dated 4/22 ('What a find!'). No analytics email. (6) Reviews: K Vos 4★ still unanswered (3 days old). Mother's Day 5/10 has 9-top reservation already on books. (7) GitHub PAT: 200 OK.

newReview.title: What a find!
newReview.snippet: One day we were looking at the The Brewhouse website from our home in the UK and then we are enjoying lunch at the premises during our holiday. This place was a real find and we loved the craft beer / food. We toured a lot of California and Las Vegas, but this was definitely our favourite find...
